title: 9 herbal teas for runners with knee swelling
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils, also known as ginger essential oil, may help with knee swelling due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes and reduce pain-causing chemicals in the body.
